entry.title: Screen field value wasn't passed into search help import parameter
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

For the following material batch search help, I can't get material number (MATNR), which was input in the screen, in the search help function exit. What could be reason of the issue? 

Field MATNR and CHARG (batch) are in the same screen structure.

Regards,

Eric

entry.title: Re: Issue missing home page for a specific persona in the...
entry.content: Hello, The note is valid for SPS02 & above and is the reason it is not applicable for your system. May be you can apply the latest TCI note for MOB-APP-MAO-FND component so that you can get all updates along with features & fixes. Please refer to the blog and apply relevant TCI notes into your system. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/upgrade-mobile-application-integration-framework-maif-using-sap-note/ba-p/13535870

entry.title: SAP Datasphere: Enabling Multiple Selection on Variable (Prompt) Screen
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need help enabling multiple selections on SAP Datasphere's prompt screen at the analytical model level. Currently, we can only make a single selection.

We need users to be able to select multiple years, such as 2023 and 2024, as well as ACT and PLN planning categories, so they can compare the two periods.

I've included screenshots showing the current expression in the filter and the prompt screens. Please advise. Thank you. SAP Datasphere

entry.title: HANA XSA Odata setup for consuming the XSA Calculation views
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My team is trying to set up "HANA XSA Odata for consuming the XSA Calculation views",

We are trying to do the same in the Webide. This API will be consumed by the middleware team for B2B consumption.

Please point me step by step on how to XSA Odata in Webide.

 

Thanks,

Shanthi

entry.title: How to archive historical data in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello,

 

As we prepare for the year-end, we need to archive data from 2022. There are approximately 300 million records that require archiving to make space for the new financial year. Does anyone know how to accomplish this within SAP Datasphere?

 

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: How to modify posting rules or create new posting rules?
entry.content:
How to modify posting rules or create new posting rules in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: UK BACS Domestic Payment Format
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a request about the UK BACS Domestic Payment Format.

This is a standard format available in SAP Business By Design. However, our bank has requested some modifications to the file structure to comply with their bank-specific software.

I ask the community if changes were possible and a reply suggested SAP can provide the XLST to generate the payment file in the desired format.

Could you please tell me if such XLST transformation exist within SAP for UK BACS Domestic Payment format? And if yes, could you please send it to us so that we can make the adjustments required by the bank?

Thank you.

Best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to modify posting rules or create new posting rules?
entry.content:
In the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you can only use pre-delivered posting rules instead of creating a customized one or modifying an existing one.

However, if there are no pre-delivered posting rules that fit your business requirements, as an alternative to posting rules, SAP recommends you use processing rules. They are the successors of the posting rules and offer improved features for you to efficiently manage your bank statement items.

Please refer to Processing Rules and Manage Processing Rules - For Bank Statements.

entry.title: Re: UK BACS Domestic Payment Format
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Please check the Help documents below for more details: 

Generation of Custom Payment File Using XSL Transformation Repository
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/dcd38bb1a815492285215b240bf75062.html?locale=en-US
XSL Transformation
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/0635ec3491974ad988be05d6b1dcf734/82421168ccf24e9d8d7101079e3f174c.html?locale=en-US
Best regards,  
Ihan
SAP Product Support
Community:
SAP Business ByDesign:
https://www.sap.com/community/topics/business-bydesign.html

entry.title: Re: Screen field value wasn't passed into search help imp...
entry.content: The root cause has been found. The search help binding name was wrong.

entry.title: Re: KSW5- Public CLoud WBS to WBS
entry.content:
Hi Buddy,

You can use project solution in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition,please refer to best practices about project area.

Also refer to comments in https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/226244/?section=sectionComments

Br, Bob

entry.title: Re: Recap of SAP S/4HANA 2023 Highlights Webinar: Service
entry.content:
@noboruota I have checked the material available here and in SAP help, and was also checking the Roadmap for service order management. After a good amount of effort, double checking all I can, I couldn't find any mention or plan to integrate with Phase based maintenance. I did have a small chat with Boris, but don't have a definitive answer on this topic.

As a consultant and customer, I see it as a big gap - when there is a push from SAP for phase based maintenance from 2021, why would SAP release Advanced Execution in service with only the old scope items of Breakdown and Preventive maintenance and not with Reactive Maintenance (4HH), Proactive Maintenance (4HI)?

Because the current development path will put customers to do two implementations. First with old maintenance scope items and S/4 Service and then redo that with new scope items and S4 Service. It is trickier with people stuck with Customer service implementations now.

entry.title: Re: in the Fressh Machine CRRuntime_64bit_13_0_22 fails t...
entry.content: Use the latest SP 36 and try again. As I said CR is simply passing the error message from the Client to you so nothing CR can do to fix that error.

entry.title: How to exclude 1 storage location during replenishment run in S//4 Retail
entry.content:
We are using S/4 Retails Replenishment functionality, where we need to exclude one of the storage locations.

Please advise

entry.title: Re: How US External Tax tackle Cross-Border Transactions between US and Canada in S/4HANA Cloud 1911
entry.content:
@aanand_2106 

Hi Anand,

Thank you for reaching out with your query.

Currently, S4HANA Cloud, Public Edition does not support Canadian tax calculations under a US company code. Therefore, generating an invoice with Canadian tax under a US company code for shipments to Canada is not feasible with the existing system capabilities. If you or your customer require this functionality, you can submit a SAP Continuous Influence item to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Finance through the SAP Customer Influence Portal. Once it receives sufficient votes, the Product Team will consider planning it for future product updates.

Please let me know if you have any other questions or need further assistance.

Best regards,

Amanda

entry.title: How to reset cleared items in closed posting periods?
entry.content:
First off, a clearing document always = 0, why on earth does a module need to be open to reset it? 

Secondly, how do I reset a cleared document that is in a closed period in AR? 

E.G The payment received in March, cleared against an open item in January. The period is now April. I don't want any postings to be made, all I want to do, is allocate the payment against a different invoice. Not hard (you would think). 

Thanks in advance...

entry.title: this._oApplicationImplementation.oMHFHelper.defineMasterHeaderFooter

entry.title: Re: How to reset cleared items in closed posting periods?
entry.content: It get's better! Resetting the cleared document in the open period, (being a payment received from the customer), credits the bank. So we have to re-create the payment received, and have transactions in the bank that are completely unrelated to the open period. How this ERP system is so popular i'll never understand.

entry.title: List Reports Issue - getting errors after Selecting Standard Variant and press GO button
entry.content: List Reports Issue - I am getting the above issue after upgradation from 1709 to 2023 version. Please provide the solution. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Datasphere to Power BI via an ODBC Connection
entry.content: @vagarwal1 thank you for your comments and the solution for getting this to work on the gateway instance. Many blogs on getting this working for individual but the key is getting this working for all users at the org level.

entry.title: SAP EWM Bonded Warehouse Outbound Process (Differentiation of stock types)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Greetings of the day

We are in process of finalizing bonded warehouse solution for our client.

Below is the requirement from business for "Outbound process", Kindly help me to understand this scenario better, which helps me to map the system settings in right direction.

  1. Warehouse 1234 is currently managed in EWM, the same warehouse 1234 they want to use as BWH, which means the warehouse has both Bonded and Non-Bonded stocks.
  2. With in Bonded warehouse they have “Free circulation” stocks and “Duty unpaid” stocks.
  3. Non bonded stocks will be with stock type F2 and bonded stocks will be with stock type C2. I am not sure if free circulation stocks will be F2 and will be separated based on partner/party entitled to dispose
  4. In ECC the storage location is only one for both Bonded and Non Bonded is 2002

Question:

When we process customer order and creates the delivery, the storage location will be 2002 for all, when the delivery gets dropped to EWM system, how system understands whether…

  1. If it is Non Bonded stocks the stock type should be F2
  2. If it is Bonded and duty unpaid, the stock type should be C2
  3. If it is Free circulation stock, the stock type should be F2

When the delivery is in EWM, system determines the stock type already, my understanding is stock type determination is crucial here.

I have never implemented BWH solution before, I have very limited knowledge, based on our internal discussions I am trying to understand and making settings.

Kindly help me with the system settings, if we need to make any specific settings in ECC/S4 or in EWM to address the above requirements.

Thanks,

Hari.

 

SAP Community  SAP Extended Warehouse Management  SAP Global Trade Services

entry.title: SAP + OpenText for ABAPers
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I had bought and completed a course named " OpenText Extended Enterprise Content Management " in UDEMY.

It is 4 hour online course and there is no mention of SAP or ABAP in the entire course.

There is one more course called SAP Vendor Invoice Management(VIM) by OpenText which I think is for Functional Consultants ( MM ).

I am an experienced ABAP Consultant and would like to know what would be the appropriate course for ABAPers when it comes to OpenText.

And also what is xECM ? Is it also related to OpenText ?

Kindly share your expertise in this area.

Thanks,
K.Kiran

entry.title: UDF and FMS not working
entry.content:
Can anyone correct my query on QUERY GENERATOR?

I need to auto populated my Origin Code UDF as when issue for production item maintain batch with field U_DEFECT.

SELECT T0.[U_DEFECT]
FROM OBTN T0
INNER JOIN IGE1 T1 ON T0.[ItemCode] = T1.[ItemCode]
WHERE T1.[ItemCode] = $[IGE1.ItemCode]
AND T0.[Quantity] > 0
AND T0.[ItemCode] = $[IGE1.ItemCode]

entry.title: Create a credit memo for the discount amount and e-Invoice against the credit memo.
entry.content:
Hello, 

We have a scenario where, the business created a Sales order against a customer order in which they missed deducting the discount which the business had agreed earlier.

(Example - order quantity - 100 Nos, Price - 10000, Discount - 5% = 9500). Outbound delivery was create and invoiced. And also e-Invoice was also generate against the invoice. 

The business now wants to create a credit memo just for the discount amount and generate an e-Invoice against this credit memo. 

I am not sure as to how to go ahead with this scenario. Request some one to guide me on this particular scenario. 

Thanks in advance.

BR..

entry.title: Re: Sap Hana rename
entry.content:
Hi 

Please try the below steps

1. Check Data Files: Ensure the required `.dat` files are present in `/hana/data`. They may have been excluded from the backup.

2. Validate Backup: Confirm the backup is complete and includes all necessary files.

3. Update Configurations: Verify that `sapprofile.ini` is correctly updated with the new hostname.

4. Run NameServer Check: Use `hdbnsutil -sr_check` to ensure the NameServer is operational.

5. Review Logs: Look for additional errors in `/hana/shared/<SID>/trace/` for more context.

6. Restore Missing Files: If needed, restore from a backup that includes the missing data files.

7. Consult SAP Notes: Check for any relevant SAP Notes for your HANA version regarding recovery issues.

8. Contact SAP Support: If unresolved, reach out to SAP Support with your logs.

9. Documentation: Review official SAP documentation for specific recovery procedures.

10. Backup Strategy: Consider adjusting your backup strategy to include all necessary files in future backups.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Logging Serviceでコンテナメトリクスを監視する
entry.content:
@MioYasutake 

ご質問ありがとうございます。おっしゃる通りMTAはCloud FoundryのSidecarプロセスに対応していないので、別途マニュアルで起動するなどの対応が必要となります。

サイドカーを使わない場合は本ブログ記事で紹介した方法ですと残念ながらメトリクス情報の連携を行うことができません。しかし、CLSが提供するOpenTelemetry API Endpoint（OLTP Endpoint）を利用することでコンテナメトリクスを連携することができます。

OLTP Endpointで簡潔にメトリクス連携を行うための条件は２つございます。

  • CLSでOLTP Endpointを有効化している。
  • 連携元のアプリがsap_java_buildpackを利用している。

OTLPの有効化はサービスインスタンスのパラメータで設定できます。（https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-logging/sap-cloud-logging/ingest-via-opentelemetry-api-endpoint?locale=en-US））

Buildpackについての指定ですが、sap_java_buildpackにはOpenTelemetry Java Agentが含まれているため、別途Agentをインストールする必要もなく簡単にセットアップが可能です。

mta.yamlのアプリモジュールの"properties"に以下を追加してCLSをバインドするだけでメトリクス情報が連携されるようになります。

 

 

JBP_CONFIG_JAVA_OPTS: "[from_environment: false, java_opts: '-javaagent:META-INF/.sap_java_buildpack/otel_agent/opentelemetry-javaagent.jar -Dotel.javaagent.extensions=META-INF/.sap_java_buildpack/otel_agent_extension/otel-agent-ext-java.jar']"

entry.title: Unable to call CAPM destination in Custom Plugin for SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a CAP model that I want to use to call both GET and POST methods from my custom SAP UI5 plugin for SAP Digital Manufacturing. We've already created a destination and configured the details in the xs-app.json file.

Now, I need to call a GET method function in the UI but I am getting a 404 (Not Found) error. Could someone guide me on how to implement this?

Any help or code snippets would be greatly appreciated. 

Note:- I have created different applications for both CAPM and Plugin


Regards,
Kartik

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG: Steps to Configure Document Types ?
entry.content:
Hi 

Please check the below 

1. Check Document Types: Verify the configuration for document types in transaction OAC0. Ensure the necessary document types are defined.

2. Configure Document Management: Use transaction SCPR20 to activate the Document Management System (DMS) if not already done.

3. Assign Document Types: In transaction OAC2, assign the required document types to the relevant business partner.

4. Check Authorizations: Ensure you have the necessary authorizations to add documents in the UIBB.

5. Review UIBB Configuration: Use transaction UIBB to check if all relevant document types are added in the UIBB configuration.

6. Test with Different User: Try adding documents with a different user profile to rule out user-specific issues.

7. Analyze Dump: Use transaction ST22 to analyze the dump and identify the root cause of the issue.

8. Debugging: If needed, run a debugger session to trace the program where the dump occurs for further insights.

9. SAP Notes: Check for any relevant SAP Notes that might address known issues with document management.

10. Consult SAP Support: If problems persist, contact SAP Support with details from the dump analysis for specialized assistance.

entry.title: Re: SAPB1 HANA - steps to import SAP Business One mobile...
entry.content:
Hi 

Please check these contents to resolve


Yes, there are some differences for importing SAP Business One mobile certificates on iOS 17 compared to older versions:

1. Trust Settings: Check and update trust settings for the certificate in the device.

2. Certificate Format: Ensure the certificate is in the correct format (.p12 or .pem).

3. Import Method: Use the updated method in the Settings app, as the interface may have changed.

4. Configuration Profile: You might need a new configuration profile for iOS 17.

5. App Version: Ensure the SAP Business One mobile app is updated to the latest version.

6. Permissions: Check that the app has the necessary permissions to use the certificate.

7. Testing: Test the certificate after installation to ensure it works.

8. Refer Documentation: Look at the latest SAP documentation for any specific updates.

Follow these steps for a smooth import process on iOS 17.

entry.title: Re: Create a credit memo for the discount amount and e-In...
entry.content:
To handle this scenario, follow these steps:

1. Create a Credit Memo:
Go to the credit memo creation screen in your ERP system.
Select the customer and reference the original sales order or invoice.

2. Enter Discount Amount:
Input the amount for the discount (e.g., 500 for a 5% discount on a 10,000 price).
Ensure that the credit memo reflects the discount as a negative amount.

3. Post the Credit Memo:
Review the details and post the credit memo to the customer’s account.

4. Generate e-Invoice:
After posting the credit memo, use the e-invoice generation feature in your system.
Select the credit memo you just created to generate the e-invoice.

5. Send e-Invoice:
Once the e-invoice is generated, send it to the customer as per your normal process.

6. Document the Process:
Keep records of the original sales order, invoice, credit memo, and e-invoice for future reference.

This approach allows you to correctly account for the discount while maintaining compliance with invoicing requirements.

entry.title: Re: SAP + OpenText for ABAPers
entry.content:
Hi 

For ABAP consultants interested in OpenText, consider the following:

1.Relevant Course: Look for courses specifically focused on integrating OpenText solutions with SAP, particularly those that cover development aspects or technical integration.

2.SAP VIM Course: The SAP Vendor Invoice Management (VIM) course is indeed more suited for functional consultants, but it can provide valuable context for how ABAP developers might work with VIM in projects.

3.xECM: Extended Enterprise Content Management (xECM) is related to OpenText. It integrates content management directly within SAP applications, streamlining processes and enhancing document handling.

4.Best Practices: Consider seeking resources or training that focus on OpenText API usage or custom development within the OpenText framework, as this would align well with your ABAP skills.

By focusing on integration and technical courses related to OpenText and SAP, you'll gain valuable knowledge applicable to your ABAP expertise.

entry.title: How to create BOM and Production order for 3 branches in SAP Business One(SAP B1)
entry.content:
I have 3 branches in all the 3 branches(A,B,C) we'll create finished and semi finished goods,
Branch - A- FG001

Branch - A- FG001 To make this FG001 we need 5 semi finished goods these semi finished goods are creating in different branches like 2 will create in Branch - B and 2 will be in Branch - C and Branch - A will be in 1 semi finished goods. 
now i'm getting confused how to create BOM and Production Order for this scenario 
please someone guide me with this it'll be so helpful for me

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: solmanへのEWAのデータ転送ジョブの停止方法
entry.content:
ご担当者様

いつもお世話になっております。

表題の件、システムログに以下のエラーが発生しました。
調査したところ、ジョブ"/BDL/TASK_PROCESSOR"によりEWA用のデータを送付しようとしてエラーになったと思われます。
本環境ではEWAは不要なため、上記ジョブを停止したいのですが、SAP推奨の手順がございますでしょうか？

----------------------------------
システムログのエラー
----------------------------------
Database error 362 at OPC
> invalid schema name: DOMAIN: line 1 col 25 (at pos 24)
Runtime error "DBIF_DSQL2_SQL_ERROR" occurred.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: solmanへのEWAのデータ転送ジョブの停止方法
entry.content:
ご担当者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

EWAレポート出力を廃止する方法としてはKBA3482581に提示された方法をご確認いただければと存じます。

KBA3482581-EarlyWatch Alert (EWA) deactivation on Solution Manager 7.2

また、管理対象システムにて、SDCCN->メニュGoto->Settings->Task processor画面に入り、「Deactivate」ボータンのご利用で、ジョブ/BDL/TASK_PROCESSORを停止できます。

以上です。宜しくお願い致します。
SAPサポート
ショウセイ

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I'm a woman, a recent graduate with a major in International Trade, and I'm very interested in enhancing my skills in the field of Procurement and Production Planning. I would like to participate in the Digital Skills Initiative, specifically to pursue SAP certification. I aspire to become a SAP Consultant and learn how to effectively operate S/4HANA, particularly within the Procurement and Production Planning modules.

In Vietnam, many companies are now adopting SAP as their ERP system, and for young professionals like myself, gaining expertise in new technologies will enable us to become highly skilled contributors. We aim to drive the growth of both businesses and the country by applying this knowledge.

With my academic background and a strong desire to learn, I believe this program will open up new career opportunities for me. I'm excited to join and learn from the community!

Thanks & Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to replace BW/HANA Composite Provider with new So...
entry.content: The solution can always be used. It will of cause not map fields that are not 1:1 but you will have the option of mapping them manually.

entry.title: Re: How US External Tax tackle Cross-Border Transactions between US and Canada in S/4HANA Cloud 1911
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: HANA XSA Odata setup for consuming the XSA Calculatio...
entry.content: I would suggest that you use the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model on XSA as it's also supported there. Check out Using Native SAP HANA Artifacts for the Calculation View.

entry.title: Custom Logic for S4HANA intercompany notification
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

with S4HANA public cloud custom logic, I am developing for this scenario

> while doing an intercompany stock transfer and the supply company do good issue, the receiving company notification to specific user id in his S4HANA account . Right now, I cannot find any  suitable extension points for this. Let me know your ideas.

entry.title: 國外供應商的第三方採購
entry.content:
大家好

請問是否有由國外供應商供應的第三方採購

我在台灣入了對客戶的銷售訂單，自動產出對中國供應商的採購單，而中國也會產生對台灣的銷售訂單

entry.title: 主页-洞察
entry.content:
业务需求

CLOUD在2408版本更新后使用了新版本SPACE界面，有客户发现一些用户的主页界面洞察视图里多出了一些磁贴和卡片，客户希望为用户统一关闭洞察视图。

系统演示

主页-洞察

登录管理员用户，并且为管理员权限添加角色：SAP_BR_EXTENSIBILITY_SPEC

回到主页，点击个人资料图标，选择调整用户界面

在洞察视图旁边右键，选择个性化我的主页

对洞察磁铁和卡片进行隐藏，选择保存

选择保存UI和激活新版本

注意：尽管管理员可以统一更改主页界面，但用户始终可以通过“我的主页设置”做个性化设置

感谢观看

entry.title: Pricing Routine creation
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Business Requirement: 

Early Bird discount should apply in the invoices for domestic customer invoice for whom invoice document created before certain cutoff date of each month and these invoices should not having preceding document of contract. As the contract is already given with discounted price , there should not be applied any additional discounts.

To achieve this we are trying to create a new routine by Using Badi PRCG_DOCUMENT_ITEM_REQUIREMENT with a condition as below

  • Should trigger only for document category = M
  • Distribution channel = 10 (Domestic)
  • Sales order without proceeding document category = G (Contract)
  • Invoice date check < Cut off date of last PERSON_NAME via new Custom Object.

However in the said BADI, we could not find the sales document field to use to get or check if there is any reference document (type=G, contract) is used for validation, where this discount should not apply.

My questions here:

Could you please confirm if we are using the correct BADI or not, If not please help with correct BADI?

Is there a way we can enhance BADI to add additional required fields? Please help.

If there is any other process to be followed for such kind of requirements in Public cloud environment, please help with details for all our future enhancements.

 

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Pricing Routine creation
entry.content:
Dear customer,

This issue falls in to a how-to query which is out of the scope of standard Support.

Please you can review the following 2 documentations:

  1. Help portal - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/82e0fb545ab4495ea83511ba57465e28.html?version=latest
  2. BADI Documentation of PRCG_DOCUMENT_ITEM_REQUIREMENT:

Use

This Business Add-In (BAdI) is used in the Pricing (SD-BF-PR) component. You can use this BAdI to check the fields of the document item for pricing requirements.

The method IS_PRCG_REQUIREMENT_FULFILLED allows you to check if the pricing requirement is fulfilled for the step in the pricing procedure or the access in the access sequence.

Parameters

Import Parameters

  • DOC_ATTRIBUTES
    Contains several attributes of the document for which pricing is executed. For example, the local currency or the document currency can be accessed.
  • DOC_DATES
    The pricing date of the document condition is transferred to the method.
  • ITEM_ATTRIBUTES
    Contains several attributes of the document for which pricing is executed. For example, the division, plant, or the material can be accessed.
  • ITEM_QUANTITIES
    Weights, volumes, and quantities associated with the condition item can be read using this parameter. Here, the ordered quantity and the ordered quantity unit are retrieved from this parameter.

Changing Parameters

  • PRICINGREQUIREMENTISFULFILLED
    This parameter specifies whether the requirement is fulfilled. If the parameter is initial, the requirement is not fulfilled, and the corresponding condition type is not considered in the pricing calculation.

Activities

Once you have implemented the BAdI, you must configure the following:

      1. In the 

Define Requirement in Pricing

       activity, you assign a routine number to the 

Requirement used in Pricing 

    (PRICING_REQUIREMENT) process enhancement option.
      2. In the same activity, you assign the filter value of the BAdI implementation as enhancement identifier (ID) for the 

Requirement for Document Item 

    (PRCG_RQMT_FOR_DOCUMENT_ITEM) process enhancement option task.
      3. In the 

Set Pricing Procedures

       or 

Maintain Access Sequences 

      activity, you assign the routine number to your custom pricing procedure or custom access sequence in the 

Requirement

     field.

Caution: You should use the statement RAISE EXCEPTION only for critical business errors or programming runtime errors. This statement causes a pricing error and therefore might block the processing of business documents.

entry.title: Re: What is Zebra printing ?
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Here you can learn about the Zebra printers: https://www.zebra.com/us/en/products/printers.html, which are mainly used to print labels.

Here's how to configure and use label printing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud:

Preparation and Setup for Label Printing
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6540a57e42314b5a8c208bca283e29e6/8f1c68af3cef4ffe929556b0edfeed1e.html?q=label%20print&locale=en-US

Creating Print Queues: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/ed3e22de359d4955a51c9164da1315ff.html?locale=en-US

Printing Slips and Labels in Inventory Management (Supply Chain)

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/53b92207de734253ab34ff5200fd372b.html?q=label%20print&locale=en-US

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: An authorization token of destination ads-rest-api has expired.
entry.content:
Hi, CAP Expert,

I deployed an application in cloud foundry . At the begin the application works fine . But after a few minutes ,some function begins to not work .I checked the backend log. There is error like "An authorization token of destination ads-rest-api has expired. Please ensure that you don't reuse destination objects in your code for longer periods of time." So the function call /getTemplates() failed . I am not sure that I implements Resiliance of cloud sdk will resolve this issue. If you experience this already, please share your solution for this .

entry.title: Tcodes for below topics
entry.content:
Dear All,

I'm new to SAP HCM. Please help me with the Tcodes for the following topics:

- Define Employee Group
- Define Employee Subgroup
- Assignment of Personnel Area to Company Code
- Assign Employee Subgroup to Employee Group
- Assign Company Code to Fiscal Year Variant
- Assign Company Code to Chart of Accounts
- Define EE Subgroup Grouping for PCR & CAP

Thanks.

entry.title: URGENT : Has Anyone Integrated SAP SuccessFactors with KeyCloak for SSO?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently leading a project to integrate SAP SuccessFactors with KeyCloak for Single Sign-On (SSO). Our setup involves KeyCloak acting as the Identity Provider (IDP) for frontline users, who are already authenticated into another application via KeyCloak. We now need to extend this authentication mechanism to SuccessFactors.

Current Setup:

  • KeyCloak is fully operational, and we have a realm where users already exists
  • SAP SuccessFactors is already installed and running,

Objective:

We want to allow frontline users to authenticate into SAP SuccessFactors using KeyCloak as the IDP. KeyCloak supports both SAML and OIDC, but we’re leaning toward using SAML for this integration.

Request:

Has anyone in the community attempted or completed a similar integration? If so, could you share:

  • Best practices for configuring SAML-based SSO between KeyCloak and SAP SuccessFactors?
  • Any specific configurations or challenges encountered on the SAP SuccessFactors side?
  • Recommendations for handling user mapping and security considerations in this setup?

Any guidance, documentation, or tips would be greatly appreciated. Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Ashish Sharam

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Hana - PO Approval email alert
entry.content: Just an update, since we're using Hana, instead of getdate. We used Current_date function

entry.title: Re: How to reset cleared items in closed posting periods?
entry.content:
Hi 

To reset a cleared document in a closed period in Accounts Receivable (AR) without making any postings, follow these steps:

1. Use Transaction: Go to transaction FBD1 (or FBRA for resetting) to reset the cleared document.

2. Document Selection: Enter the clearing document number and the relevant company code.

3. Reset Cleared Document:
Execute the reset process. This will unlink the payment from the cleared invoice without posting anything.

4. Reallocate Payment:
After resetting, use transaction F-28 (or F-30) to reallocate the payment to the desired invoice.

5. Handling Closed Period: Since the period is closed, ensure that no postings are made; only the allocation is updated.

6. Check: Confirm the new allocation and ensure everything is accurate in your AR records.

This method allows you to reallocate payments efficiently while maintaining the integrity of closed periods.

entry.title: Re: URGENT : Has Anyone Integrated SAP SuccessFactors wit...
entry.content:
Hi 

Please find the below some key points for integrating KeyCloak with SAP SuccessFactors using SAML for SSO:

Best Practices for SAML Configuration
1. Create a SAML Client in KeyCloak:
Go to your KeyCloak realm, create a new client for SAP SuccessFactors.
Set the client protocol to SAML.

2. Configure SAML Settings:
Client ID: Set it to the SuccessFactors entity ID.
Valid Redirect URIs: Add the SuccessFactors ACS URL.
Signing Algorithm: Use a secure algorithm (e.g., RSA_SHA256).

3. Metadata Exchange:
Export the KeyCloak SAML metadata and import it into SuccessFactors.
Obtain SuccessFactors' metadata and configure it in KeyCloak.

Specific Configurations in SuccessFactors
SAML Configuration: Navigate to the SSO settings in SuccessFactors. Input KeyCloak's SAML metadata and configure the attribute mappings.
Attribute Mapping: Ensure to map the user identifiers (like email or user ID) properly between KeyCloak and SuccessFactors.

User Mapping and Security Considerations
User Provisioning: Decide whether users will be provisioned automatically or managed manually in SuccessFactors.
Claims Mapping: Ensure KeyCloak is sending necessary user attributes as claims (e.g., email, role).
SSL: Always use SSL for secure communication between KeyCloak and SuccessFactors.

Common Challenges
Debugging SAML Assertions: Use tools like SAML-tracer to monitor SAML assertions and troubleshoot issues.
Time Synchronization: Ensure both KeyCloak and SuccessFactors have synchronized system times to avoid token expiry issues.

Resources
KeyCloak Documentation: Refer to [KeyCloak SAML documentation](https://www.keycloak.org/docs/latest/server_admin/#saml-identity-broker).
SuccessFactors Community: Check the SAP SuccessFactors community forums for specific examples.

entry.title: Re: WEBGUI passing multiple values to one field via url
entry.content:
Hello experts,

do we have already solution how to use multiple value in URL ?

Thx

Martin

entry.title: Re: Sales BOM: Can we have components in the Sales BOM fr...
entry.content:
@jignesh_mehta3Thanks for your kind input. Appreciate it.

The business is fine with having the BOM components delivered in multiple deliveries, which I believe can be managed through the 'Delivery group' configuration.

Currently, the business sells a package to customers that includes a main product, an add-on product, and a non-stock item (access to the business platform). The main and add-on products may be sourced from different plants, so they currently handle this by creating multiple sales orders: one for the non-stock item/service with all price, one for the main product at no charge, and one for the add-on product also at no charge.

I believe we can utilize the Sales BOM functionality to simplify this process, allowing the business to avoid creating multiple orders.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Tcodes for below topics
entry.content:
Hi

Here are the Tcodes for your SAP HCM topics:

1. Define Employee Group:
Tcode: OUGA

2. Define Employee Subgroup:
Tcode: OUGB

3. Assignment of Personnel Area to Company Code:
Tcode: OBY6

4. Assign Employee Subgroup to Employee Group:
Tcode: OUBD

5. Assign Company Code to Fiscal Year Variant:
Tcode: OB29

6. Assign Company Code to Chart of Accounts:
Tcode: OBD4

7. Define EE Subgroup Grouping for PCR & CAP:
Tcode: OUGA (same as Employee Group; then use grouping)

entry.title: Examples or demos for the Open-source ABAP2XLSX library
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I understand that the open-source ABAP2XLSX library provides enhanced flexibility in formatting and content control when exporting data to Excel. With ABAP2XLSX, we can handle cell colors, borders, and other Excel features that are not supported by the standard ALV Excel download functionality. Could you please share any available examples or demos showcasing these capabilities?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: An authorization token of destination ads-rest-api ha...
entry.content:
Hi 

Please find the below steps

To resolve the token expiration issue in your Cloud Foundry application:

1. Implement Token Refresh: Always fetch a new token before making API calls.
2. Use Destination Service: Utilize the Destination Service to get fresh tokens.
3. Check Token Lifespan: Review and adjust the token lifespan in your destination settings.
4. Implement Retries: Use the Cloud SDK's resilience features to add retry logic.
5. Avoid Long Token Reuse: Don’t reuse tokens for extended periods.
6. Review Logs: Monitor logs to catch token expiry events early.
7. SDK Documentation: Refer to the SAP Cloud SDK documentation for best practices.
8. Test Thoroughly: Perform end-to-end tests to ensure stability.
9. Monitor Performance: Keep an eye on the application's performance post-implementation.
10. Stay Updated: Regularly check for updates or patches in the SDK that may address this issue.

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required with Exchange Rate Differences in...
entry.content:
Hi 

Please check this

. Check Currency Settings: Ensure the purchase order and goods receipt have the correct currencies set.

2. Verify Exchange Rates: Confirm the exchange rates are updated and correct for both the purchase order and goods receipt.

3. Review Purchase Order: Look at the amount and currency in the purchase order.

4. Check Goods Receipt Amount: Verify the amount posted in the goods receipt and its currency.

5. Calculate Exchange Rate Differences:
- Use the formula: Amount in Local Currency = Amount in Foreign Currency × Exchange Rate.
- Determine the rates at both times.

6. Calculate Difference: Find the difference in local currency between the purchase order and goods receipt amounts.

7. Review Account Assignments: Ensure the correct accounts are assigned for posting exchange rate differences.

8. Check Document Flow: Look at the document flow to ensure all entries are linked correctly.

9. Post Adjustments: If discrepancies exist, manually adjust if necessary or confirm automatic postings.

10. Consult Finance Team: If issues persist, consult your finance team for further configuration or posting rules.

entry.title: Stop Production Order Release if PRT Missing
entry.content:
We would like to stop releasing Production Order if PRT details are missing. How can I do it?

Is there any standard configuration available in SAP S/4 Hana 1709?

entry.title: Delegation visibility in New Learning experience
entry.content:
Hello All,

It is observed that the 'Delegation' option is not available in 'New Learning Experience' unlike in the 'Current Learning page' where we can find the option under 'Links'. This is a very important feature which is useful for employees/managers to amend or add learnings on the direct manager behalf. 

May I know if there is a chance of adding this enhancement at the earliest as everyone has to move to New Learning page at some point and the employees and managers have to use the Delegation option in Learning.

Regards

Raja Sekhar

entry.title: Generate Absences based on Holiday Calendar
entry.content:
We have a requirement where the user will maintaint  the holiday calendar at the beginning of the year. After which they will run time evaluation to generate absences based on the maintained date of the holiday calendar.

For example on 01.01.2025 they will maintain a holiday on 30.05.2025, they will run time evaluation on 01.01.2025 and the absence record will be generated for with the date 30.05.2025. 

Considering of using PCR that read the holiday class of the date, but as far as i know PCR for time evaluation can only read past dates and not future date.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Hide dynamically measures
entry.content:
Hi Ganjos, 

  I'm afraid there is no API at the moment can support this. But nevertheless, user still can right click in the table on the dimension -> table functions -> show/hide -> and toggle display on/off zero or null. 

  Please also vote and follow influence item: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/266685

Best regards, William

How can I display total values in that table?

Ines Martins

entry.title: Re: How to archive historical data in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello,
you can use the Data Lake.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/working-with-the-embedded-data-lake-in-sap-datasphere/ba-p/13569701

Currently there is a restriction that you can use it only in one Space (so kinda like an IT centrelized Archive).

Regards
Julian
